extract: Sylveon (Japanese: ニンフィア Nymphia) is a Fairy-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Eevee when leveled up while knowing a Fairy-type move and having two hearts of affection or high friendship. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) It is one of Eevee's final forms, the others being Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Espeon, Umbreon, Leafeon, and Glaceon.
